mapper.sql: id, member_id, `before`, content, wallet, `current`, `type`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into member_wallet_history (id, member_id, `before`, content, wallet, `current`, `type`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{before,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wallet,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{current,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

id,
member_id,
`before`,
content,
wallet,
`current`,
`type`,
create_time,
create_by,
update_by,
update_time,
delete_flag,

mapper.update:
update member_wallet_history
member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`before` = #{before,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wallet = #{wallet,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
`current` = #{current,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update member_wallet_history set member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `before` = #{before,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wallet = #{wallet,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `current` = #{current,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into member_wallet_history (id, member_id, `before`, content, wallet, `current`, `type`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.before,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.wallet,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.current,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})
